| | | | 12 Days of Tom: Day 11
---
---
**11 months.** Just eleven months from now, America decides which direction our country will take in the coming decade. What is the future that you dream of, friend? Is it the one where we address the climate crisis head on and save the world together? Will we hold our government officials accountable, and ensure new representation by introducing term limits? It’s not enough to get rid of Trump. We need to replace this corrupt administration with one focused on doing the right thing, even when it’s politically inconvenient. That’s why your support for Tom — along with hundreds of thousands of Americans who already do — is so important! **Will you help show the strength of this team and get ready for the next stage of the campaign by chipping in at least $1?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
| | URGENT: What matters to you?
We're setting our 2020 goals and need your input.

| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/dec-2020-priorities-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2")

* * *
It's hard to believe, but 2020 is right around the corner. That's why our senior staff are sitting down to strategize how we can accomplish our goal of electing more pro-science candidates next year. But we don't want to do it without hearing from you first.

[Can you take our quick 2020 priorities survey? We need 12,500 responses to make sure we have accurate data.](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/dec-2020-priorities-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+take+our+quick+2020+priorities+s&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2")

Together we've had tremendous success in electing scientists up and down the ticket. We share common values: accurate science, climate action, lowering healthcare costs, and more. But we want to know about what you specifically are hoping to see us achieve in 2020.

[That's why we're asking you to take this survey. Your voice matters -- will you share it now?](https://secure.314action.?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/dec-2020-priorities-survey?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Thats+why+were+asking+you+to+take+this+s&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2&source=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2&refcode=314_EM_PT_90OP_191214_1_2")

Thank you,

All of us on the 314 Action Team

name: Team Yang
subject: Video message from Andrew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Check it out

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY) Yang Gang --

We have just one day left to reach our $2 million goal, and grassroots donations have been surging. But we still have a massive gap.

So Andrew has a message he wanted to share with you. [Check it out, then make sure we don’t fall short: ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19741?t=8&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19741?t=16&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19741?t=15&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY)

Thanks to your generosity, the tour has been a massive success.

Iowans are responding to Andrew’s message, and every event has been packed to the brim. It’s all culminating tonight with a massive “50 days out” rally in Iowa City.

[We want to make sure Andrew can meet as many people in person as possible in the final weeks before voting and caucusing begins, but we need your help. Please donate $10 or more now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19741?t=9&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY)

Thanks for making this tour across Iowa our strongest one yet,

Team Yang

P.S. Make sure to follow along on [Twitter](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10679?t=2&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY), [Facebook](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10693?t=3&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY) and [Instagram](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19705?t=4&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY) for coverage of the event and more content from the Iowa Bus Tour.
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19741?t=17&akid=4741%2E377263%2EjFOPAY)

name: Booker HQ
subject: Howard Dean & Joe Lieberman & Wesley Clark & Richard Gephardt & Al Sharpton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Go back in time with me for a minute. It was 16 years ago this week. I was working for John Kerry in Polk County, Iowa -- just weeks before the caucuses. A CBS News poll came out that week that was packaged with headlines like "Dean Pulls Away in Dem Race," but the numbers painted an even bleaker picture for us -- take a look: Howard Dean: 23%
Wesley Clark: 10%
Joe Lieberman: 10%
Richard Gephardt: 6%
Al Sharpton: 5%
**John Kerry: 4%**
John Edwards: 2% People were writing our campaign obituary. Four weeks later, the entire race turned on its head when John Kerry won Iowa (and John Edwards finished in second). It wasn't a miracle -- what happened was a whole lot of hard work and a little bit of well-timed momentum paid off. Right now, Cory Booker is in the middle of the best month of this campaign. **The way we pull off something incredible is through each of us doing our part --[will you chip in today and help keep this momentum up through the holidays?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191214_BHQ_20191214-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I bring this up because way, way, way too much of what we hear about this primary campaign is based on who's up and who's down in these polls. It's not right -- because it's often just not accurate. I'm not saying pollsters aren't good at what they do. I'm saying a poll only measures so much. It doesn't predict the future. And in a state like Iowa, where things can change fast, today's poll numbers mean a lot less than how many precinct captains you signed up -- or how many conversations you had with caucus-goers. If I've learned anything from my years working with Cory Booker, it's that I wouldn't underestimate him. And I would say the same thing about this team. [**Don 't let anyone write us off -- chip in right now, and let's make this the best fundraising quarter of our campaign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191214_BHQ_20191214-fr-BHQ-EM2-suppressionsend_suppressionsend_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks -- always good to time-travel with you,

Addisu
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1f/5fca0d19/782ca341/291c9a7b/4222942995/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1f/5fca0d19/782ca341/291c9a7a/4222942995/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1f/5fca0d19/782ca341/291c9a79/4222942995/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1f/5fca0d19/782ca341/291c9a78/4222942995/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1f/5fca0d19/782ca341/291c9a47/4222942995/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1f/5fca0d19/782ca341/291c9a7b/4222942995/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Tina Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have an all-important FEC fundraising deadline at the end of this month and we're behind on our goal. I'm asking you to pitch in today, if you can.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-short?refcode=em191214-short&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend -- I am going to keep this message short and sweet.

When I'm not in DC, I'm back home in Minnesota spending every possible minute I can with the folks who make our state great. Talking with them about the issues that matter most to their communities, working to find solutions to the problems they face, and making sure I'm carrying their voices back to Washington.

You're a big part of the reason I get to do that. Here's why:

**We have an FEC fundraising deadline at the end of this month (and year!) and our grassroots donors are an increasingly large part of how we raise our money.**

Now according to my finance team, we're behind on our grassroots goal by about $12,462. If we don't catch up by Monday, I'm afraid of losing some quality time talking with Minnesotans on the campaign trail. So, I'm asking:

**Can you chip in $10 to my re-election ahead of our critical FEC fundraising deadline in a few short weeks? With Trump and Republicans going all-in on Minnesota, we can't afford to fall short right now -- and I need to stay focused on doing my job.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-short?refcode=em191214-short&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-short?refcode=em191214-short&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-short?refcode=em191214-short&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-short?refcode=em191214-short&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-short?refcode=em191214-short&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191214-short?refcode=em191214-short&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

I'm so lucky to have an incredible team made up of supporters just like you. I can always count on the responses to these messages being really great, and I cannot tell you how grateful I am that you're a part of this.

Thanks for all you do.

-- Tina

name: Texas Healthcare Alert
subject: Texas has the highest uninsured rate in the country - today is your last day to enroll in healthcare coverage for 2020 - don’t miss your opportunity, Peter.

Friend,

Each day I'm in the office I walk by our HUGE **2019 Trump Donor Wall,** and each day I notice your name is _**MISSING.**_

_We only have 3,450 spots left on the Donor Wall,_ so the President asked me to personally reach out to you to remind you that this is your LAST CHANCE.

This big, beautiful wall is comprised of President Trump's most loyal supporters, and I know he really wants to see your name up there.

We set a lot of goals for this movement -- doors knocked, selfies taken, and canvasses held.

But to power it all, first, we need to hit our grassroots fundraising goals.

Right now we're focusing on hitting our critical mid-month fundraising goal by tomorrow. And the only way we're going to reach it is with the help of grassroots donors, donating through emails like this one.

**Your first contribution today will have a powerful impact. So we're asking:**

[**Will you pitch in $2 today to help make sure we can hit this goal and make December our strongest fundraising month yet?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b27d/45c30650/1137772e5/66fb7556/3393220183/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTYyRl9NTUdfR09MX1RfMjAxOTEyMTVfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM62F_MMG_GOL_T_20191215_V1S1_P")

Kids Snowflake Making Workshop We will keep the kids entertained by decorating the office with fun snowflakes! Can't wait to see you there! Team Canning

|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cec5/30a4f917/509649c4/28cef7d5/2948344988/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1")

| | In 2018, Republican Steve Chabot kept his seat by less than 5%, down from his 18.4% win in 2016. This district was also Trump's narrowest margin of victory in Ohio in the 2016 presidential election. This means we'll see an influx of dark money in 2020 to keep our district red -- and we have to do all we can to combat the Republicans' desperate grasp for power. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - In 2018, Republican Steve Chabot kept his seat by less than 5%, down from his 18.4% win in 2016. **This district was also Trump's narrowest margin of victory in Ohio in the 2016 presidential election.** This means we'll see an influx of dark money in 2020 to keep our district red -- and we have to do all we can to combat the Republicans' desperate grasp for power. We know people are fed up with partisan bickering that prioritizes the president over the interests of the American people -- **and it 's time we do something about it.** [**If you agree, chip in to our campaign to unseat Steve Chabot ahead of our last public FEC end of quarter deadline of the year ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_decmm?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+If+you+agree+chip+in+to+our+campaign+to+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_decmm?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM4_U3_X1")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: What a time for the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We have to hit this goal TONIGHT

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4744%2E377263%2ELpVfzk) Yang Gang --

What a time for the campaign! Last week we embarked on an incredible tour around Iowa. I had the chance to talk face-to-face with many voters who take their job picking the future president very seriously. The words that made my heart sing: “I am going to caucus for you.”

We are leveling up on every dimension: opening offices in the early states, hiring field staff, building our press operation, and more.

We’re no longer a long shot. We’re top contenders. That’s why we raised the stakes and announced an ambitious goal of $2 million by midnight tonight!

**[Please, pitch in $10 now to ensure we hit our $2 million goal by our deadline at midnight tonight. Prove we have what it takes to be in it for the long haul.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19760?t=5&akid=4744%2E377263%2ELpVfzk)** | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19760?t=8&akid=4744%2E377263%2ELpVfzk)
---
Each day becomes more important than the one before, especially as we reach the end of 2019. I am ready to end this year on a strong note and shock everyone watching by our success in December.

But in order to do that, we have to hit every goal we set. It is crucial that we reach $2 million by midnight, and if you contribute today, I may give you a call!

**[Give everything you can now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19760?t=7&akid=4744%2E377263%2ELpVfzk)**

Your revved up candidate,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19760?t=6&akid=4744%2E377263%2ELpVfzk)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4744%2E377263%2ELpVfzk) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4744%2E377263%2ELpVfzk) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

body:
We know this race is competitive...

|

| | Have you seen the headlines about Texas, Peter?! There's a clear trend: Texas is the biggest battleground state. Sen. Cornyn is vulnerable. And MJ Hegar is the candidate to beat him! **[Pitch in to help make it happen>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fe/7f51f7bc/4a6f027e/4ef0eb12/4019871597/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191215.1nd__629__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fe/7f51f7bc/4a6f027e/4ef0eb12/4019871597/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191215.1nd__629__&amount=10&recurring=true")

**" The most-watched race in Texas will be the Senate battle," according to the _Dallas Morning News_. And _The Washington Post_ knows Texas is in play, too, ranking Texas' Senate seat among the top 10 "most likely to flip in 2020!"**

We know this race is competitive, and we know we can win ‐‐ but it'll only happen with your help. It takes a lot of resources to run a Texas-sized campaign. **[Will you donate $5 or more to our battleground campaign right now? We'll send you an MJ for Texas bumper sticker as thanks!*](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906fe/7f51f7bc/4a6f027e/4ef0eb12/4019871597/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191215.1nd__629__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Cory Booker
subject: Even candidates for president need a sick day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
As you may have heard, I had to pull myself off the campaign trail this weekend because I came down with the flu.
Hey team,
As you may have heard, I had to pull myself off the campaign trail this weekend because I came down with the flu.
The good news is, after some much-needed rest, I'm already starting to feel a bit better. I look forward to starting my travels up again soon, and my team is already looking to reschedule a few events I missed.
But here's the thing, staying home this weekend has taken away time that I would have normally spent fundraising.
I need you to have my back this weekend while I rest up. Will you chip in to help keep our campaign running while I'm off the trail?
Here's a link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191215_CB_20191215-fr-CB-EM1-activesnosuppression_activesnosuppression_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Looking forward to being back out there soon,
Cory
P.S. I was going to make a joke about my sickness, but it _flu_ over my head.
P.P.S. I hope you didn't take _tissue_ with that bad joke.
P.P.P.S. I wish I could blame these jokes on my fever.
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1e/5fca0d19/7857fa69/291c992a/1530417110/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1e/5fca0d19/7857fa69/291c9929/1530417110/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1e/5fca0d19/7857fa69/291c9928/1530417110/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1e/5fca0d19/7857fa69/291c9937/1530417110/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1e/5fca0d19/7857fa69/291c9936/1530417110/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c1e/5fca0d19/7857fa69/291c992a/1530417110/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

But here’s the | | | It’s been a whirlwind of a year, and now as we round out 2019, our team is hard at work mapping out our plan to win Kansas in 2020. But here’s the thing: we’re in danger of coming in behind on our December fundraising goal. That means we’ll have to make cuts to our outreach across the state next year unless we catch up. And with our fundraising totals going public for the first time at the end of the year, we cannot afford to fall short. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi and House Dems restore Voting Rights Act protections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In the middle of the impeachment hearings, Nancy Pelosi is showing the country what real leadership looks like. She, along with Reps. John Lewis and Terri Sewell, passed a landmark voting rights bill, the Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA), which would restore voting rights and election protections gutted by the conservatives on the Supreme Court. BUT all but one Republican voted against it in the House, and Mitch McConnell's waiting to kill the bill in the Senate. Republicans don't want more people to vote. They know that when people vote, the GOP loses. They'd rather keep as few people voting as possible so they can hold on to power and let their rich donors dictate policy instead of the people. At When Democrats, we're doing all we can to inform voters about the GOP's nefarious actions and get them to the polls to defeat the GOP. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House in 2020, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and we HAVE to stop the GOP from cheating, purging voter rolls, and discouraging voters. We need 10,000 engaged Democrats to demand the Senate pass the VRAA and ensure every eligible voter can vote in 2020 \-- if you believe we need to stand up to the GOP and protect the right to vote: **Demand the Senate protect the right to vote!** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf5b/6e9863e8/172d6629/1db0b689/3366306833/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/wH_zRhKs") Thank you for standing up for democracy. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf5b/6e9863e8/172d6629/1db0b688/3366306833/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191215a.ND&refcode2=OEdgYwOmIlLFteAwB3g6")
---
|
---

---

Washington, DC 20003

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: The scariest thing? What he might do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390913/55b66746/2d782262/80f053a/1273599984/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | This week, we will almost certainly see Donald Trump become just the third president in nearly 250 years of our republic's history to be impeached. But that's just step one. **The message is clear: the only way to stop Donald Trump from abusing his office is to remove him from it.** Trump treats rules, laws, and limits as annoyances for him to dodge, not instruments of fairness. His repeated invitations to foreign powers to meddle in our elections and attack his political opponents show that **Trump sees democracy itself not as an ideal, but a nuisance.** As dangerous as Trump's behavior has been, it pales in comparison to what he might do if he feels there are no repercussions for his actions. So we, the people, must make sure our voices are clear. This president must be impeached. [Donate](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390913/55b66746/2d782262/80f053b/1273599984/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-14-impeachment&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 21 years later . . .
body:
The vote to impeach President Trump is headed to the floor.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-4759661-20abc502cb-27e8984ebb)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-4759661-20abc502cb-27e8984ebb) On Friday, House Democrats passed two Articles of Impeachment through the Judiciary Committee.

**The vote to impeach President Trump is headed to the floor.**

The vote is likely to take place on **December 19th, 2019.**

On **December 19th, 1998** , William Jefferson Clinton was impeached.

Yep, no one is talking about this 21-year "coincidence" because it would mean that Nancy Pelosi, Schiff, Nadler and the other Democrats are getting their revenge for Republicans impeaching Bill Clinton.

And I'll bet that **Hillary is loving all of this as she plots her return to the national scene**.

It's mind-numbing to think that Democrats are impeaching a president for political advantage . . . but it's the sober truth.

My opponent, radical Democrat **Lois Frankel** , who is typically one of the most INACTIVE members of Congress, has taken a lead on impeachment . . . and **is already plotting for "Impeachment 2.0" in 2020 as a backup plan**.

As a Congresswoman for Florida 21 -- home to Mar-a-Lago -- Frankel serves President and Mrs. Trump.

But instead of serving her constituents, she is busy making my district THE future battleground against the president.

**Frankel has to go**. [Help me send her packing by contributing to my campaign today.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-4759661-20abc502cb-27e8984ebb)

Earlier this week, Frankel held a tele-townhall to discuss the impeachment of President Trump. As her constituent, I called in, but -- surprise, surprise -- my Congresswoman wouldn't take my question or ANY questions from conservatives or independents.

But here's where things get interesting, **Lois Frankel, is a lieutenant for Hillary Clinton.**

In 2016, Frankel bundled $100,000 in donations for Clinton's campaign and was a founder of the "Hillary for Florida Leadership Council."

**Frankel 's close friend**, district neighbor and fellow Congresswoman, **Donna Shalala, ran the Clinton Foundation!**

To cap the "trifecta" of influence for Hillary (and Florida politics) is **Debbie Wasserman-Schultz, one of the most cut-throat players in politics today**.

It's Frankel, Shalala, and Wasserman-Schultz who are responsible for making sure President Trump doesn't repeat his win in 2020.

And if my suspicions are correct, they'll be tasked with making sure their mentor, Hillary Clinton, wins Florida in 2020. **Win Florida, and you win the White House**.

But here's the thing . . . it's near impossible for a Democrat presidential candidate to win Florida without winning Southeast Florida, **which includes my district**.

And Frankel is DEEPLY vulnerable in this election (more coming on that later).

[So with your support](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-4759661-20abc502cb-27e8984ebb), **we 're flipping Florida's 21st Congressional seat!**

And we're not just getting rid of a Trump-hating, Hillary loving, do-nothing Democrat like Frankel, **we 're KEEPING Florida red for President Trump!**

Thanks for all that you do, and please, **[send in $10, $25 or whatever you can now](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-4759661-20abc502cb-27e8984ebb), and help me outraise Democrat Lois Frankel for a second time!**

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. **We 're starting the countdown to the end of the quarter**. Christmas, Hanukkah, family and last-minute holiday shopping take priority over politics (I'm embarrassed to admit that I'm not even close to finishing my gift list). I get it. So if you're able, [make a donation now](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-4759661-20abc502cb-27e8984ebb) before things get too hectic. Thank you again for everything. [I literally cannot do this without you](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-4759661-20abc502cb-27e8984ebb).

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-356826-832791-84585d41bbe610b-27e8984ebb)

---

body:
We can make it if everyone pitches in

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4743%2E377263%2Ez_JasA) Yang Gang --

It’s now or never -- we have hours left to hit our goal of raising $2 million by midnight tonight.

**Throughout this campaign, we’ve been extremely transparent about our fundraising.** If you look at Yang2020.com, you can see our progress in real time. So if we hit our goal (or don’t), the whole world -- including the press -- will know. [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19783?t=5&akid=4743%2E377263%2Ez_JasA) [Whether we hit our goal or not will send a message about our ability to compete in this race. Can you step up and help us close the gap? So if we hit our goal (or don’t), the whole world -- including the press -- will know. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We’re going to be asking a lot from you today. That’s because this campaign is only as powerful as the grassroots movement behind it. And we know the Yang Gang is the most powerful force in politics today. Yang2020 We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now. |

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: Add your name to endorse Ed today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| **Ed reached out the other day to ask you to personally endorse his re-election campaign. We 're going to give him a list of everyone who steps up to say they're part of this team soon, and we want to make sure your name is on that list. Will you endorse Ed today?**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df38/693b8b0a/43870201/72de7f83/2246734434/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em191215-full")**
Friends -

Serving you in the U.S. Senate is the honor of a lifetime.

Growing up as the son of a milkman in Malden, I never imagined that I'd have the privilege to fight for our shared values within the walls of Congress.

I know I did not get here alone. Every success in my life has been a result of the people who supported me along the way -- from my parents to friends like you.

To win in 2020, we're going to need a grassroots movement once again. I need to know if you're with us.

**[Will you add your name to personally endorse my re-election campaign today? The only way we can win this race is if we do it together.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df38/693b8b0a/43870201/72de7f83/2246734434/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em191215-full")**

I know this will not be easy. We've got two opponents who are mounting serious challenges.

But I will not back down. This moment is too important for our progressive agenda.

Together, we can pass the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, a $15/hour minimum wage, and so much more.

But I need you to help me stay in those fights in the U.S. Senate. Are you in?

**[Add your name right now to endorse my re-election campaign. Our work is just getting started, and we need as many people standing together as possible in order to win.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df38/693b8b0a/43870201/72de7f83/2246734434/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em191215-full")**

It's an honor to have so many people like you on this team. We're going to do big things together.

Thank you,

Ed
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df38/693b8b0a/43870201/72de7f83/2246734434/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/personal-endorsement?source=em191215-full")**

We don’t need more politicians who simply agree that climate change is bad and that our health care system is broken — we need fighters who aren’t afraid to advocate for solutions like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All. And we definitely can’t keep flooding our elections with money from corporate interests like the fossil fuel industry and Big Pharma. If we want to lead with our hearts, not with our bank accounts, we need to do the hard work and build a movement by the people, for the people. **That’s why we set a goal to raise 3,000 grassroots donations by the end of this year.** Especially now that a couple more candidates have jumped into this race, we _really need_ a surge of grassroots support to make sure we have the resources to compete.**But as of this afternoon, we’re 68 donations short.** **[So when I say that there’s never been a more critical time to donate to our campaign, I really mean it. Please chip in however much you can today to ensure we have the means to fight for a bold, progressive agenda this election.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/6QA/ni0YAA/t.2xk/8U0JSyrpR6OIKr9sCesNMg/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwCKMV61JFDE-2BMjt7APchGJrOC9d8-2F48EFhMizVDUHHG7tm56LlGWm1EMP7-2BMXk4QDcW0q9GyzSBHo6fptmMX8vwb90-2BJaAHzOmNPvD-2B0JjunwygX0jlwrnhUcICngvNI8Nwtwf4ev-2BBPNLUnI7BT4-2Fdk6xFM4ovwvVOXyrmBmnTzNlO9bfwY10B3qUnGzHysM83f-2Bg97S9tGrUgiVz1IeGxPigtS2ykWz2NXHYQ1khghTPnrEjssYHmSXReGLg4m2WZCfniczdDNnAqMHufJnjQ-3D-3D/D1vI) ** [Contribute $21.17

clean_body: We started this campaign because the change we dream of and talk about will never happen unless we start doing things very differently. | | | Friend, I have a big favor to ask you. ****** We started this campaign because the change we dream of and talk about will never happen unless we start doing things very differently. We don’t need billionaires in Congress — we need more folks who know what it’s like to fight to put food on the table, to work more than 40 hours a week and still struggle to make ends meet. We don’t need more politicians who simply agree that climate change is bad and that our health care system is broken — we need fighters who aren’t afraid to advocate for solutions like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All. And we definitely can’t keep flooding our elections with money from corporate interests like the fossil fuel industry and Big Pharma. If we want to lead with our hearts, not with our bank accounts, we need to do the hard work and build a movement by the people, for the people. That’s why we set a goal to raise 3,000 grassroots donations by the end of this year. Especially now that a couple more candidates have jumped into this race, we really need a surge of grassroots support to make sure we have the resources to compete.But as of this afternoon, we’re 68 donations short. ** We have until midnight, Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

subject: Collins was a key vote on the GOP tax bill that gave trillions to corporations and the wealthy, but did little for hardworking families. She consistently puts the needs of her rich donors first -- and it's time to replace her in the Senate.
body:
FedEx contributed thousands....
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed2a/1192435081/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Susan Collins puts the needs of her wealthy donors above Mainers. It 's time to replace her in the Senate.**
**[Chip in to Sara Gideon's people-powered campaign today!](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed29/1192435081/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191215-1-full")**
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed29/1192435081/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191215-1-full")******
Friends,
In 2017, FedEx owed more than $1.5 billion in taxes. Now, they owe $0. What happened?
**They contributed thousands to Susan Collins ' PAC.**
Susan Collins was a critical vote on the GOP tax bill that gave nearly $2 trillion to corporations and the wealthy, but did little for hardworking families. She consistently puts the needs of her rich donors first, so it's time to replace her in the Senate:
**[Make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's people-powered campaign today. We're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation goes a very long way.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed29/1192435081/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191215-1-full")**
Susan Collins' campaign is bankrolled by big money donors -- and it shows in her priorities as a legislator. But if we keep fighting, we're going to replace her with Sara Gideon, a real champion for working people.
All our best,
Team Gideon
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed29/1192435081/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMTUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191215-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed28/1192435081/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed2f/1192435081/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fdd/4bef7a87/6a42ecb8/287fed2e/1192435081/VEsO/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Kristen Foca
subject: Winning takes work... and Stephanie's working hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Three months into the campaign, we have worked hard to bring representation back to this district. There's a long road ahead, but we will win if we keep up the work. |
---
friends -- Stephanie is no stranger to hard work. She has what it takes to defeat Chris Smith, but she needs your support before the end of the quarter. Read Stephanie's email below from earlier this week to see all the hard work she's put in so far. **[And, if you can, make your first contribution to defeat Chris Smith right now.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09c/522d4087/7afc6320/4f3417c5/3762846878/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191215_em_nd")** Thanks, Kristen Foca
Communications Director | **[Donate](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09c/522d4087/7afc6320/4f3417c5/3762846878/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191215_em_nd")**
---

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
Date: Friday, December 13
Re: Winning takes work
From: Stephanie Schmid

| | **We launched this campaign just three months ago, friends.** From registering voters with the Monmouth County Young Democrats and the Monmouth Black American Caucus... ... To knocking on doors... ... And phone banking for local candidates ahead of the November elections... Our campaign has been about working alongside volunteers and talking to voters to bring meaningful change to Mercer, Monmouth, and Ocean counties. There's a long road ahead in this campaign, but I know we will win because we will put in the hard work week after week, month after month. So, from the bottom of my heart, thank you for all your support. It means the world to our campaign. \- Stephanie | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09c/522d4087/7afc6320/4f3417c5/3762846878/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191215_em_nd")**
---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff09c/522d4087/7afc6320/4f3417c4/3762846878/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

"" Thanks, Kristen Foca Communications Director | "" \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- Date: Friday, December 13 Re: Winning takes work From: Stephanie Schmid | | We launched this campaign just three months ago, friends. From registering voters with the Monmouth County Young Democrats and the Monmouth Black American Caucus... ... To knocking on doors... ... And phone banking for local candidates ahead of the November elections... Our campaign has been about working alongside volunteers and talking to voters to bring meaningful change to Mercer, Monmouth, and Ocean counties. There's a long road ahead in this campaign, but I know we will win because we will put in the hard work week after week, month after month. So, from the bottom of my heart, thank you for all your support. It means the world to our campaign. \- Stephanie | "" | | | Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey. Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=emfooter&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5 Stephanie for New Jersey P.O. Box 217 Little Silver, NJ 07739 Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to "" at any time._

name: MJ Hegar
subject: There is no I in Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's gonna take all of us.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906f8/7f51f7bc/4a61fe4c/4ef0eb0c/961703369/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

When people ask what makes me the right person to serve as their next senator, I tell them to look at my record. From serving as a combat search and rescue pilot to fighting to open up hundreds of thousands of jobs for women in the military, I have faced down tough fights and won.

**Those experiences taught me that completing a mission successfully starts early. And that 's why we're already working so hard to build the campaign we need to win this race. [Will you pitch in to help out? For a limited time, donate $5 or more and we'll send you an MJ for Texas bumper sticker as thanks.*](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906f8/7f51f7bc/4a61fe4c/4ef0eb03/961703369/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?refcode=email_20191215.2nd__631__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We're not letting a single minute go to waste. We're visiting communities around the state. We're talking to Texans about the issues that matter to them. We're building the foundation and the team we need to win this race. **And we need you with us.**

**Will you donate so we can keep building our team and talking with Texans all over the state? We 're going to win this _together_.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648906f8/7f51f7bc/4a61fe4c/4ef0eb07/961703369/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-decmidmonth?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191215.2nd__631__&amount=50")**

name: Jenny Nadicksbernd
subject: A disturbing trend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're ramping up for November 2020, but our fundraising isn't doing the same. news from Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight.
|
---
**Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
2019 Online Donor Status: PENDING
[BECOME A 2019 DONOR HERE >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89fae4/3383415932/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=__389__&refcode2=statusbar")**

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89fae3/3383415932/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Derek,

**Right now is when we need to be ramping up for 2020.** We're less than a year out from November, and re-electing Mark and keeping Virginia blue isn't something that can happen overnight. But while our campaign headquarters have gotten more active, our fundraising hasn't done the same. We've actually seen our donation rate _decrease_ since the November election!

**I know that this past November was an enormous fight for our Commonwealth -- but we aren't done yet. Can I count on you to donate now to Mark's re-election campaign and help us keep our fundraising numbers on track?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89fae2/3383415932/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89fae1/3383415932/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89fae0/3383415932/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89faef/3383415932/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89faee/3383415932/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?express_lane=true&refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89faed/3383415932/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**

Mark will be the _only_ Democrat running a statewide campaign in Virginia next year. That means we need to be sure that this campaign is strong enough to send Mark back to the Senate **and** powerful enough to uplift all the Democrats running across the commonwealth. We know that the GOP is going to put up a BIG fight: _multiple_ Republicans have already joined the race against Mark, and the Trump campaign is making it clear that they want to win here.

We have a big fight ahead of us and we can't afford to fall behind. If we do, we risk letting Republicans flip Mark's seat and undo the incredible progress we've made. **[Donate now to help us meet our fundraising goals and keep Mark in the Senate fighting for us!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89faec/3383415932/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d72e/53d9897e/5397f1ae/1c89faec/3383415932/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM4OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepfund-nd?refcode=20191216_f_1_nd__389__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****

---

---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ba/3eb3e2fc/690f5435/744ee834/1767447560/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191215_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191215_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ba/3eb3e2fc/690f5435/744ee833/1767447560/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191215_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191215_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8ba/3eb3e2fc/690f5435/744ee832/1767447560/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191215_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191215_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

We need him in this race championing police reform, putting forth plans to address the lead crisis, and standing up for marginalized communities. "" "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Maya Rupert Campaign Manager | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

subject: Last Week with Rob #3
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
# **LAST WEEK WITH ROB**

Dear Friends,

Welcome back to another ‘Last Week with Rob’ recap. I’ve been busy traveling NY-27 this week and meeting with constituents, businesses, and even gained a special rating from an important group.

---
|
---
### Tuesday Night with SAfE
Tuesday night, I joined the Second Amendment ForEver (SAFE) Group to discuss the importance of firearms in our daily lives. We also discussed the importance of firearm owners going out to vote, no matter the election cycle. While firearms were the focus, we talked about the “impeachment” sham going on in Washington, and the need for a strong and battle-tested patriot to join President Trump and help clean up the swamp.
|
---
### NYSRPA "A" Rating
Reaffirming my commitment and dedication to the Second Amendment, I was honored to be given an "A" rating from the New York State Rifle and Pistol Association, a state branch of the NRA. As you may know, I am the sponsor of several repeal bills for the NY SAFE Act. This unconstitutional legislation, which was passed in the dead of night without public scrutiny, has been an unnecessary and burdensome law on the lives of responsible, law-abiding gun owners. I continue to fight this intrusive legislation and I’m proud to continually stand up for our Second Amendment rights as Americans, even if I am one of the few legislative voices to do so.
|
---
---
|
### Wednesday with the Muckdogs
Lastly, on Wednesday night I joined the Batavia Muckdogs and their management for a tour of their facility. With current discussions between Major Lague Baseball and its minor league affiliates, the Muckdogs run the risk of being located. I was able to learn about not only the entertainment value the Muckdogs have on our Batavia community but also the business value that the team brings to the surrounding area. Baseball is America's pastime and the residents of Batavia deserve to have a little slice of Americana in their backyard. We must keep the Muckdogs here in Western New York.
---
| As always, feel free to stay up to date on my campaign by following me on facebook and twitter at @RobOrttforCongress and let me know what’s going on in your community and your life. Thank you and God Bless.

Rob
Battle-tested Patriot

name: Doyle Canning
subject: 7 years since Sandy Hook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
My opponent is one of only 18 House Democrats that does not support a ban on assault style rifles and large capacity magazines, in 2019. This is consistent with his record | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.2xk/5MJJednnT0q8IUQR93buFQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718lyGJXsU3CQs0LR50VmhN6t-2FiAOcOmOijy-2Fmu-2FqVv8iQGQdhQlA-2BnLSNAWvWPA-2ByRlcElvrFpJEGDepVx8GX4WV8yNw2n9xfwt606BQkVAKjAaqmel0KyBYPLOHyWLWudErBEPcsxiDjqjfBMQtNnIA-3D-3D/dvc2)
---
Dear Friend, Yesterday marked the seventh anniversary of the Sandy Hook school shooting in Newtown, Connecticut. Twenty first graders and six teachers were gunned down, in their classrooms. I remember watching the news in utter horror, and thinking to myself, "this time, things will change..." But they didn't. Over the last seven years since Sandy Hook, the NRA has only become more powerful, and gun violence has only become more normalized, to the point of a gruesome routine. Just last week, my first grader was teaching her little brother about what to do when there is a "lock down" at school, turning off the lights and showing him how to hide from an active shooter. Our families don't have to live like this. That's why I am running for Congress. My opponent is one of only [18 House Democrats](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.2xk/5MJJednnT0q8IUQR93buFQ/h1/Cx2HdOjvYaAoAoi1sYHOaIUQWeL98R-2FvCLhHH4zKnrDqvsk4pBICOt7-2FXFgbs0y7nn5hXXq1zvFl2RWSbQagJYnwWXqPeiDx0WisvfoBhmQGtdEiALPDsuAUfCGUrWvPbQrC2QSy7sVhbCbfVAo5IgDAppOIfLGt2nJM3WkGeMDgzAi9ed-2BYYMXY25B-2FTMfAKo-2FnpoEb-2FivCjqEiIv7YGP8WIEgSk8bruKlI9Z8x3CY7SEKOP94BEZVQYo4mz9vEBGx1VjS-2FOFTgf9ywmS8MVND4DgqzhMqxWzmfX8Zrj7s6yXrluHq68K3NfXjNZUqPBmEe971C-2FcPylFUxDOudYQ-3D-3D/oMXg) that sides with Republicans and does not support a ban on assault style rifles and large capacity magazines, in 2019. This is consistent with his record; the last time the House took up such a measure, in 1994, he voted against it. As Keith Cunningham-Parmeter of Willamette University College of Law put it shortly after the Sandy Hook massacre: "[Defazio Never Strays Far from the NRA](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.2xk/5MJJednnT0q8IUQR93buFQ/h2/9Keqjt2rNZ2OQD7Ygf3GCMp7MLxn1Ceznb4i42yML59LiKN-2FLMQqcpsBUcynuKDFKUvc2-2FJSrxXlOQHdfBHPGqPCzG5-2BwgG-2FthGYgJQ47ha6pqQjtyyga3Np1Yf6SU8EWzlExFsBOiHYduDBibvRPi-2Fs6oBMvm14peetFZd54EB806MllMfN-2FNc6H7vmlGYEdbRB6wlZcMoelhJy7PDriGkkGgceKQDEWJpxWxFBll-2FkVkEjKGsLkzTxLqUmv8xCoVfQrS3PIGGPb5wlDvTeha6aJYInGKZeCACfEAMDYGAil7eVNX95SH9WAfYFknVR/wffd)." **[Will you donate $20.20 today to take a stand?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.2xk/5MJJednnT0q8IUQR93buFQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0RrXTMsgpMVixuEZwp9uPDV7qBTYpWu78fONtzFvAmVBZDjBtEZlno116whfoOPtOLHoJGJ-2BIZU62mvB4HJ0NbdOy86ldPZoIjtBlZ0lnyZDall76guvIufxuTxzC8M-2BvO1C5mMOXYdHjYpuUJ9oAaUuuXKC7wnU3QC2V06U3c4Q7yLiZFEX4ky-2BOVUPwZ3vnGLGJmESkSYFujAtgXl-2Bv8lY52FBX1cMQHrl8-2FawLwX0-3D/WHoH)**

It is time to take a stand, to resist the agenda of weapons makers and the NRA, and to end gun violence in America. We cannot afford to risk the lives of our children any longer. I'm in this fight for my kids, and for yours, and I'm never backing down. Onward, Doyle Canning

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tell your elected officials you are praying
body:
| | Peter, This is the last week Congress is in session before they travel home to spend the Christmas holiday with their families and constituents. With a nation mired in political division, now is the time to press in and pray for our elected officials. It is paramount that we reach out and remind each of them serving “we the people” that their strength comes from our Creator, the Savior who was born in a manger, died and rose again, and on whom the Government rests. Send President Trump, Vice President Pence, and members of Congress a personal note, letting them know you are praying for them and remind them of the reason we celebrate Christmas. | | _For to us a child is born, to us a son is given, and the government will be on his shoulders. And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace._ Isaiah 9:6
---|---
I hope you will utilize our [easy tool and take just two minutes of your time to send a Christmas message](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=uBu3YfQVnXMp-YAfnCM0i8mi9TdbfozwaFyrk7lUWx0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191215p2a01&n=1) to President Trump, Vice President Pence, and your elected members of Congress.
They need to be reminded of the reason for the season and that millions of Christians are praying for them and their families.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=uBu3YfQVnXMp-YAfnCM0i8mi9TdbfozwaFyrk7lUWx0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191215p2a01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191215p2a01&n=3)

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Look, I'll just be blunt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy. So I'm not hosting any fundraisers where you can only meet me if... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b39c/45c30650/1135003c8/66fb7bfc/2426749071/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy.

So I'm not hosting any fundraisers where you can only meet me if you can write a big check. And I'm not taking any money from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

You'll always know that I'm fighting for you -- not for any powerful special interest with deep pockets.

But our grassroots campaign is up against a big test. After the end of this month, we'll release a public report on how much we've raised in the past three months and how many people have chipped in to own a piece of our campaign.

**Look, I'll just be blunt: We need those fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible, and we're behind where we want to be to hit our fundraising goals.**

[**So I'm asking: Will you pitch in $2 or whatever you can today to help grow our campaign?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b39c/45c30650/1135003c8/66fb7bff/2426749071/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY0Rl9FR1JfTkZGX0VfMjAxOTEyMTVfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM64F_EGR_NFF_E_20191215_V1S3_P")

>
When I ran for office for the first time, not very long ago, I had a lot to learn.

But here was the first -- and most important -- lesson I got: Nobody does this on their own.

I'm grateful down to my toes for everyone who knocks on doors, makes phone calls, texts their friends about our new plans, hosts debate watch parties, and chips in $3 at a time. For everyone who makes this campaign their own. For everyone who's in this fight all the way.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies -- everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected.

We can end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and save our democracy. But only if we keep growing our grassroots movement with grassroots donors in Pennsylvania and across the country.

[**That comes down to hitting this powerfully important mid-month goal before our next FEC fundraising deadline. Time's running short. If you can, please make a contribution today -- I'll be deeply grateful.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b39c/45c30650/1135003c8/66fb7bff/2426749071/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTY0Rl9FR1JfTkZGX0VfMjAxOTEyMTVfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM64F_EGR_NFF_E_20191215_V1S3_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: BookerForKentucky.Com
subject: midnight deadline
body:
|

Folks, Here’s the thing: Mitch McConnell is in a position where he could actually deliver real opportunity for Kentucky. But he’s chosen to put his own interests — money and power — first. Charles is doing this listening tour to sit down and talk with Kentuckians about their concerns — like how they’re going to pay rent or find the money for childcare and medicine. He’s fighting to make sure Kentuckians’ voices are finally in the rooms where decisions happen. This is the most important deadline our movement has faced so far. Charles has spent hours on the road since he kicked off this listening tour almost two weeks ago. But there’s far more ground to cover to reach as many people as possible. _**[We are just hours away from our midnight deadline, and we’re $1,039 short of our goal. Charles is counting on your grassroots support to close this gap. Will you chip in $10 or more to this movement to defeat Mitch McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12902863/133311321/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191215-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDRjMTE2ZC05ZTFmLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lz42jMploek1Z-FlZYQ_XacGY3-r1Gj8Tyuj1EDTuJU=)**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12902864/133311322/-1631903886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cbec20191215-AB-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDRjMTE2ZC05ZTFmLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lz42jMploek1Z-FlZYQ_XacGY3-r1Gj8Tyuj1EDTuJU=)

While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, **[will you donate to his exploratory committee?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12902870/133311328/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191215-nd_footer&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDRjMTE2ZC05ZTFmLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lz42jMploek1Z-FlZYQ_XacGY3-r1Gj8Tyuj1EDTuJU=)**

| [Team, we're absolutely blown away to be 80% of the way to reaching our weekend goal!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba902/134673f2/92ee43c/69978d07/1081686465/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_121519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Listen, I wasn’t planning on emailing you again today, but our campaign is truly out of options.

**Please, believe me: It is incredibly frustrating to have to raise so much money to run for Congress.** This is my least favorite part of campaigning. It’s part of a bigger problem that we MUST solve by getting money out of politics. But to do that, we need to win first.

Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy isn’t counting on grassroots donations like I am. He’s depending on special interests to fund his campaign. _That’s the WRONG way to win an election, Peter._

So, you and I have a choice tonight:
* * *
**Option 1:[Step up, work extra hard, and reach this $3,500 fundraising goal and beat Kevin McCarthy. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12903879/133328421/10128690?refcode=20191215-EM-E2-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=055f092c-a91f-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTVmMDkyYy1hOTFmLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Vv75pHefXoXzWKMER9udCdLUwz5VMv05tFQOnPaIuE=)**

[Will You Be a Campaign Patriot?](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EGGptzk&) Peter, Thanks to the committed support of patriots like you, our **Faces of America** spokespeople have been on the air in Alabama, California, Maine, New Mexico, and Pennsylvania since August. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EBW9CJb&) As the nation is distracted by the ongoing impeachment **WITCH HUNT** , we're laser-focused on helping Donald Trump win reelection... and we have the winning strategy. But in order to succeed, we MUST stay **ON THE AIR** in the five key states listed above... ...and raise the funds we need to **launch new ad campaigns** in crucial states including: **❑** **Michigan** one supporting John James for Senate and another opposing radical Rep. Rashida Tlaib **❑** **Minnesota** to defeat America-hating Ilhan Omar **❑** **New York** to rabid socialist Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) And if funds permit, we'll launch a hard-hitting billboard campaign against Mad Max in California. We're selecting locations and getting bids as I type. Here's a draft of the billboard: [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EyARMSQ&) Peter, it's **imperative** that we stay ON THE AIR to ensure minority voters continue to hear the truth about the **RACIST LIES** that Democrats have been spoon-feeding them about Republicans for decades. We've proven that our "Nadler Method" outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years. Right now, President Trump is gaining significant ground among minority voters with **recent polls showing his approval ratings at 35% with Black voters, 38% with Hispanics, and 28% with Asians.** [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EhxdFxH&) But in order to turn these approval ratings into real votes, we MUST stay ON THE AIR and expand into the states where President Trump needs the most help (and can win) and defeat some of the most radical, socialist political incumbents. **We have paid for our radio time through December are now working to raise $43,800 to keep Zo, Kimberlin, Greg, Dat and myself on the air and expand into our next targeted states.** WE MUST FIGHT together on behalf of President Trump's re-election and reverse the Left's march toward Socialism. The battle for America continues, and with you by our side, we will prevail. [Please decide to become a CAMPAIGN PATRIOT today by chipping-in a little each month to our advertising campaign.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EVgqIR3&) [A gift of even $20.20 per month would be a huge help in budgeting as we move forward.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EQcKB9Q&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EziWSza&) We've come so far in four years, having another four is imperative. There's a lot of work to do, but together, we can dispel the Liberals' Lies and continue to Make America Great Again. [I trust you will do what you can.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EGuEJAB&) | | _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---
P.S. Peter, it's an honor to fight alongside you, on behalf of our great Country, to reverse the Left's march toward Socialism.
[Your support keeps us going!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=EtnRtI7&)
I'll be sending you more information and updating you regularly on our progress...
...but for now I want to thank you for your generous support and extend my Christmas wishes and New Year blessings to you and your loved ones.
[BECOME A CAMPAIGN PATRIOT TODAY!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Ba2lYN&mc=9Q&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=i&z=E9dVMPR&)
---

If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.
