name: Team Yang
subject: Reality check: We might fail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We saw a surge of donations this morning, but things have slowed to a trickle.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s) Reality check time, Yang Gang.

We saw a surge of donations this morning, but things have slowed to a trickle. For the first time ever we might not hit our goal.

[ Don’t let us fall short. Rush a donation of $10 immediately.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=5&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=8&amount=25&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---
We shocked the pundits and press the last time we hit our big goal. They didn’t think we could do it even once. Now they’re watching and wondering if we’re going to fail this time.

We cannot let that happen, Yang Gang.

If just 5% of everyone who opens this email gives $10, we’ll hit our goal with hours to spare.

[ Can Andrew count on you? Don’t let him down.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=7&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=6&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---
Let’s do this!

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/19841?t=14&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4771%2E377263%2Ebeb-0s) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Nikki (personal)
subject: I'm counting on you to send a message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Congress
body:
---
| | I'm reaching out one last time for our mid-month fundraising push -- the last thing I want to do is have to bother you over and over again during the holidays. Campaigns are tough -- you need to be prepared for anything. It caught me off guard that Washington Republicans would brand me a "socialist loser," but I fought overseas for their right to say whatever they like about me. And I know when voters hear my message, they'll see those attacks for exactly what they are -- a desperate attempt to smear my record of service and sacrifice for the American people. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - I'm reaching out one last time for our mid-month fundraising push -- the last thing I want to do is have to bother you over and over again during the holidays. **Campaigns are tough** \-- you need to be prepared for anything. It caught me off guard that Washington Republicans would brand me a "socialist loser," but I fought overseas for their right to say whatever they like about me. And I know when voters hear my message, they'll see those attacks for exactly what they are -- **a desperate attempt to smear my record of service and sacrifice for the American people.** I've flown combat missions over Iraq and Afghanistan, so I'm tough enough to handle whatever Republicans want to throw my way. But we can't let their attacks be the only messages voters are hearing -- [**_that 's why I'm hoping you'll click here to chip in ahead of our final FEC end of quarter deadline of the year._**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_decmm?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM5_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+hoping+yoursquoll&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM5_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM5_U1_X1") Thank you for having my back, Nikki
---

|
---
| If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cec4/30a4f917/5096055d/28cef73f/686455730/VEsE/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_footer_ab&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM5_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM5_U1_X1")

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cec4/30a4f917/5096055d/28cef73e/686455730/VEsF/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://nikkifoster.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+click+here&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM5_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191215_MM5_U1_X1")

name: Jeremiah, TomSteyer.com
subject: Sunday Update: Tom’s solid plan to support HBCUs + three ways to tune in this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hey there: I’m Jeremiah, and I’m Tom’s Social Impact Director. I support Tom because I know he would be doing this work whether or not he was running for president — he's in the fight alongside us. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Donald Trump's Supreme Court allows an anti-abortion law to go into effect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | The Supreme Court, led by Trump's hand-picked, anti-choice justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, rejected a challenge to a Kentucky law requiring doctors to perform ultrasounds and play a fetal heartbeat to those seeking abortions. This comes on the heels of SCOTUS announcing it will review a Louisiana abortion case this spring \-- meaning they could undo Roe v. Wade in the next few months. This is a dream scenario for the GOP \-- they've been appointing anti-choice judges and campaigning hard on removing your right to make decisions about your body. We're ready to take them on, but we can't do it alone. We need engaged Democrats to stand up with us. name: Susan Collins
subject: Independent Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
During my time in the Senate, I have often been the deciding vote on some of our country's most important decisions. It has been a true honor to be a voice for all Mainers in Washington.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDEzNDIxNTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTQ0NjUwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEzNDIxNTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTQ0NjUwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Dear Peter,
During my time in the Senate, I have often been the deciding vote on some of our country's most important decisions. It has been a true honor to be a voice for all Mainers in Washington.
My priority in the Senate has always been to provide practical solutions to problems that everyday Mainers and Americans face. For years, _The Lugar Center and Georgetown University 's McCourt School of Public Policy_ have named me the most bipartisan member of the Senate. As your Senator, I have made it my priority to extend a hand across the aisle, work with those who disagree with me, and reach compromises that benefit Maine and America.
I will never allow anyone to bully me into voting the way they want. I will always be a voice you can count on,**[but I need your help.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEzNDIxNTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTQ0NjUwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
The battle ahead is NOT going to be easy. There are already multiple groups up across Maine televisions lying about my record. I need your help to fight back.
[DONATE TO SUSAN](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDEzNDIxNTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTQ0NjUwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
I promise to always fight for Mainers, no matter how hard the radical left and their billionaire-funded Super PACs try to stop me. I hope you will join me in this fight!
All my best,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDEzNDIxNTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTQ0NjUwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Susan
_****_
_****_
[
SusanCollins.com
](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDEzNDIxNTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MTQ0NjUwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: Donald Trump and Jason Lewis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Help us keep Minnesota from falling into the wrong hands and make sure this seat continues working for the people.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191215-trump?refcode=em191215-trump&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team -- Donald Trump will be coming back to Minnesota.

He knows the path to the Senate majority runs through our state, so he'll likely be joined by our opponent, Jason Lewis -- who was handpicked by Trump to run against Tina.

Lewis spent his time in Washington repeatedly siding with powerful special interests over the people of Minnesota -- voting to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions and to give massive tax breaks to the wealthy and big corporations.

Minnesotans deserve a leader who will fight for solutions to the problems we face, not just continue to be part of the problem in Washington. We found that sort of leadership in Tina, which means we have to make sure she stays in the Senate fighting for us.

**Can you pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford to give us the resources we need to keep Minnesota from falling into the wrong hands and keep this seat working for the people? name: Tom 2020
subject: [12 Days of Tom] 10 years organizing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---

Friend: Tom grew up in a household that lived by the rule: “Actions speak louder than words.” This belief that you must show up for the important things spurred Tom to leave the business world and turn to grassroots organizing. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: This is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
This month, hundreds of thousands of Georgians could be stripped of their right to vote. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b6/34a064cc/1b13376f/7035e18/1784140180/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - This month, hundreds of thousands of Georgians could be stripped of their right to vote. However, this is not the first time - we're witnessing the latest chapter in a long history of voter suppression. My parents were active in the Civil Rights Movement, and my father got arrested helping people register to vote in Mississippi when he was just 16 years old. My mom was doing the same work (although she was smart enough not to get caught). The same forces that my parents fought against decades ago are still very much alive and well today. So heading into 2020 we have some work to do. This fight takes a movement -- a movement we have to build together. That's why today I am asking you personally: [**Will you chip in to Fair Fight today? We've set a big goal of raising $2 million before the end of the year. If we can do that, it'll give us a major head start on the work we want to accomplish in 2020.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b6/34a064cc/1b13376f/7035e19/1784140180/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjE1MTlTRVktMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE121519SEY-1-a") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b6/34a064cc/1b13376f/7035e19/1784140180/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjE1MTlTRVktMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE121519SEY-1-a")** Voting rights are the path through which all other change is made possible. The progress we want to see made real become so because of voting. As we head into one of the most important elections of our lifetime, we have to recognize that we cannot tackle the issues we care about and create the change we want if the voices of voters are not heard. Together, we will work to give everyone a Fair Fight. Yours in the fight, \- Stacey **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b6/34a064cc/1b13376f/7035e19/1784140180/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjE1MTlTRVktMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE121519SEY-1-a")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: ⚖️ Holding DC Accountable
body:
Our Founders never wanted politics to become a career, we need term limits on career politicians to remind them who holds power in our country.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489

https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gp-brugYROw&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489
Politicians talk and talk but rarely get anything done. In Congress, I will introduce a constitutional amendment to put term limits on everyone in Congress, myself included. It's time politicians live by the rules they make.

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489
Hello

I've pledged that I will only serve five terms (10 years) in Congress and I've been raising awareness about the need for congressional term limits since day one of my campaign. It's We the People not We the Government, and many of the career politicians in Washington need to be reminded of that. I support term limits for a number of reasons:
* Our Founding Fathers didn't want people making a career out of politics
* Term limits force politicians to work towards solutions that help the American people and not just their own re-elections and careers
* Congressmen typically spend more money the longer they continue to serve in office

We need to remind the political class and Washington that government is accountable to us and not the other way around. Iowans in the Fourth District demand a representative who will hold himself to the same standards they keep in their daily life. That means no selling their influence as a lobbyist, no ridiculous pensions, and no separate justice system for the well-connected and powerful.

I can't fight against corruption and for accountability in our government without your support. Please consider donating $5, $15 or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489) to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donations can be made here (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489) .

Feel free to reach out to me at
bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you!

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come.

Your neighbor,
MORE ON GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABILITY
PROMOTING OUR MESSAGE

BUILDING OUR NETWORK
Enjoyed meeting conservatives from across the district this week as we visited the Boone County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Boone-County-Iowa-Republicans-135793693101285/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489) in Boone, Woodbury County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Woodbury-GOP-127360237310973/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489) in Sioux City, Plymouth County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Plymouth-County-Iowa-GOP-421127217946811/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489) in Le Mars, and Sioux County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Sioux-County-GOP-312985805406619/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489) in Orange City. Deeply appreciate Jacki Thompson for hosting a house party at her beautiful home in Belmond where we added more supporters to #TeamBret.
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-makes-his-case-to-dethrone-king/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489

“Iowans are tired of career politicians,” Richards said. “Anyone that’s been in the system, people have second thoughts about.”
https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-visits-the-newsmaker-in-hampton/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489

https://soundcloud.com/user-779936563/newsmaker-ep-1218-bret-richards-house-republican-candidate?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=898cb7f270-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_10_09_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-898cb7f270-25822489
"What’s different is I’m going to bring some effectiveness and the point of view of a businessman that gets things done. As a business owner that employed 300 people, I know that we have to balance the budget.”

UP NEXT

Looking forward to a great week meeting the members of ABATE District #25 and District #8. Blessed to have Quint and Maggie DeWitte, Executive Director of Iowans for Life, hosting our next house party at their home this week.

clean_body: Our Founders never wanted politics to become a career, we need term limits on career politicians to remind them who holds power in our country. Politicians talk and talk but rarely get anything done. In Congress, I will introduce a constitutional amendment to put term limits on everyone in Congress, myself included. It's time politicians live by the rules they make. Hello I've pledged that I will only serve five terms (10 years) in Congress and I've been raising awareness about the need for congressional term limits since day one of my campaign. It's We the People not We the Government, and many of the career politicians in Washington need to be reminded of that. I support term limits for a number of reasons: Our Founding Fathers didn't want people making a career out of politics Term limits force politicians to work towards solutions that help the American people and not just their own re-elections and careers * Congressmen typically spend more money the longer they continue to serve in office We need to remind the political class and Washington that government is accountable to us and not the other way around. Iowans in the Fourth District demand a representative who will hold himself to the same standards they keep in their daily life. That means no selling their influence as a lobbyist, no ridiculous pensions, and no separate justice system for the well-connected and powerful. I can't fight against corruption and for accountability in our government without your support. Please consider donating $5, $15 or even $25 () to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donations can be made here () . Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you! I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come. Your neighbor, MORE ON GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABILITY PROMOTING OUR MESSAGE Check out our latest video highlighting how Iowa neighbors solve problems better than career politicians! BUILDING OUR NETWORK Enjoyed meeting conservatives from across the district this week as we visited the Boone County GOP () in Boone, Woodbury County GOP () in Sioux City, Plymouth County GOP () in Le Mars, and Sioux County GOP () in Orange City. Deeply appreciate Jacki Thompson for hosting a house party at her beautiful home in Belmond where we added more supporters to #TeamBret. RECENT COVERAGE “Iowans are tired of career politicians,” Richards said. “Anyone that’s been in the system, people have second thoughts about.” "What’s different is I’m going to bring some effectiveness and the point of view of a businessman that gets things done. As a business owner that employed 300 people, I know that we have to balance the budget.” UP NEXT Looking forward to a great week meeting the members of ABATE District #25 and District #8. Blessed to have Quint and Maggie DeWitte, Executive Director of Iowans for Life, hosting our next house party at their home this week. GET INVOLVED BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY! We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders.
